top_signals.title: Updating the Bank of England’s fee regime for recognised payment systems
top_signals.summary: The government is consulting on the fee regime for recognised payment systems, specified service providers and digital settlement asset service providers.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Why Logistics Tech Is Failing the AI Test
top_signals.summary:
Gnosis Freight CRO Michael Rentz breaks down what operational-grade data infrastructure actually requires, and what shippers should be asking every technology vendor before they buy.

The post Why Logistics Tech Is Failing the AI Test appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Stripe, Advent make $53 billion takeover offer for PayPal, sending stock soaring
top_signals.summary: Stripe and Advent International have made a joint offer to acquire PayPal for $60.50 per share, in a deal that would valued at more than $53 billion.
